response.justification: Despite extensive experience, the candidate is significantly overqualified and has not held a junior/mid-level role in over a decade, raising concerns about fit, salary expectations, and willingness to operate as an individual contributor in a hands-on, on-site environment. Their focus on AI-agent infrastructure and niche languages like DLang diverges from the role’s core stack (TypeScript, React, Nest.js, PostgreSQL), and their German language proficiency is insufficient for high on-site collaboration in Berlin.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven track record in scalable web architectures and DevOps tooling
Strong open-source contributions and teaching ability in software practices
concerns: Overqualified with 15+ years of senior experience, likely misaligned with junior/mid-level role
Limited evidence of PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience; relies heavily on MongoDB and DLang
Basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site presence requirement
